# Access API, gRPC: AccessService.GetConfiguration

Returns the AuthZEN discovery configuration for this Policy Decision Point.

## gRPC request

```proto
rpc GetConfiguration (GetConfigurationRequest) returns (ConfigurationResponse)
```

## GetConfigurationRequest

```json
{}
```

## ConfigurationResponse

```json
{
  "policy_decision_point": "string",
  "access_evaluation_endpoint": "string",
  "access_evaluations_endpoint": "string",
  "search_resource_endpoint": "string",
  "search_subject_endpoint": "string",
  "search_action_endpoint": "string",
  "capabilities": [
    "string"
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| policy_decision_point | string | No description. |
| access_evaluation_endpoint | string | No description. |
| access_evaluations_endpoint | string | No description. |
| search_resource_endpoint | string | No description. |
| search_subject_endpoint | string | No description. |
| search_action_endpoint | string | No description. |
| capabilities[] | string | No description. |
